posts.author: VijayNair
posts.text: Review for weekly Iron Condors on Nifty — Indeed. Even STBT straddles (with some rolling) had one of the best ever months . Fat premiums took care of moves with headroom to spare…

posts.author: Jason_Castelino
posts.text: Review for weekly Iron Condors on Nifty — Didn’t matter. Because premiums were high. So the gaps were priced in. Infact outperformance is higher. March outperformed by 1 percent. April outperformed by 3 percent.

posts.author: Subramanian_Muthu_kr
posts.text: Review for weekly Iron Condors on Nifty — Hey, Still following this startegy? How was you situation during huge gapup and gapdown situations?
